title: SynapseGridSituationFrame
description: Models a single live spatiotemporal progression frame across 6 stadium nodes during an elite T20 cricket event, with 5G MEC edge anonymization layers.

match_id.description: Alphanumeric unique identifier for the match or event.

event_id.description: Alphanumeric unique identifier for the specific event frame.

marker.description: Progression metric representation, e.g., 'Over 18.2' or an ISO-8601 timestamp sequence.

score_summary.description: Active cricket score standing or match state string, e.g., '184/4 (18.2 Ov)'.

primary_actor.description: Active operational focal target, e.g., batsman, bowler, or specific gateway coordinator.

match_phase.description: The active physical and operational phase of the cricket event driving semantic invalidations.

plate_redacted.description: Simulated 5G MEC Hardware edge abstraction marking automatic vehicle license plate redactions.

faces_redacted.description: Simulated 5G MEC Hardware edge abstraction marking automatic camera facial blurring redactions.

feature_vector.description: High-dimensional crowd state embedding (6 nodes * 4 dimensions) extracted at the 5G MEC Edge.

simulated_queue_depth.description: Simulated queue counter for backpressure modeling.

backpressure_active.description: Flags whether adaptive down-sampling is engaged.

crowd_velocity_mps.description: Crowd velocity in meters per second.

turnstile_flow_rate.description: Number of people passing turnstiles per minute.

cognitive_drift_index.description: Anonymized behavioral index tracking cognitive variance and drift.
